steps.title: Find the structural signal
steps.content: The phrase “This motivated biologists Delbert A. Green II and Cassandra G. Extavour to evaluate both types of convergence in a single study for their 2012 paper” reveals the passage's purpose: to explain what led to that 2012 study. Everything before it, including the underlined sentence, provides the context that motivated that research.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: The underlined sentence presents Prudhomme's research as an example of prior work studying convergent evolution before the Green & Extavour 2012 study. The other choices either extend discussion beyond the text, reverse the relationship, or claim clarification where none occurs. That matches choice B — B is correct.
